verses.text_gr: Βίβλος γενέσεως Ἰησοῦ Χριστοῦ υἱοῦ Δαυὶδ υἱοῦ Ἀβραάμ
verses.transliteration: Biblos geneseōs Iēsou Christou huiou Dauid huiou Abraam
verses.translation_en: The book of the genealogy of Jesus Christ, the son of David, the son of Abraham

verses.text_gr: Ἰδὼν δὲ τοὺς ὄχλους ἀνέβη εἰς τὸ ὄρος
verses.transliteration: Idōn de tous ochlous anebē eis to oros
verses.translation_en: Seeing the crowds, he went up on the mountain

verses.text_gr: Μακάριοι οἱ πτωχοὶ τῷ πνεύματι ὅτι αὐτῶν ἐστιν ἡ βασιλεία τῶν οὐρανῶν
verses.transliteration: Makarioi hoi ptōchoi tō pneumati hoti autōn estin hē basileia tōn ouranōn
verses.translation_en: Blessed are the poor in spirit, for theirs is the kingdom of heaven

verses.text_gr: Μακάριοι οἱ πραεῖς ὅτι αὐτοὶ κληρονομήσουσιν τὴν γῆν
verses.transliteration: Makarioi hoi praeis hoti autoi klēronomēsousin tēn gēn
verses.translation_en: Blessed are the meek, for they shall inherit the earth

verses.text_gr: Μακάριοι οἱ εἰρηνοποιοί ὅτι υἱοὶ θεοῦ κληθήσονται
verses.transliteration: Makarioi hoi eirēnopoioi hoti huioi theou klēthēsontai
verses.translation_en: Blessed are the peacemakers, for they shall be called sons of God

verses.text_gr: Ἀλλ' ὅστις σε ῥαπίσει ἐπὶ τὴν δεξιάν σου σιαγόνα, στρέψον αὐτῷ καὶ τὴν ἄλλην
verses.transliteration: All' hostis se rhapisei epi tēn dexian sou siagona, strepson autō kai tēn allēn
verses.translation_en: But whoever slaps you on your right cheek, turn the other to him also

verses.text_gr: Ἀγαπᾶτε τοὺς ἐχθροὺς ὑμῶν καὶ προσεύχεσθε ὑπὲρ τῶν διωκόντων ὑμᾶς
verses.transliteration: Agapate tous echthrous hymōn kai proseuchesthe hyper tōn diōkontōn hymas
verses.translation_en: Love your enemies and pray for those who persecute you

verses.text_gr: Πάτερ ἡμῶν ὁ ἐν τοῖς οὐρανοῖς ἁγιασθήτω τὸ ὄνομά σου
verses.transliteration: Pater hēmōn ho en tois ouranois hagiasthētō to onoma sou
verses.translation_en: Our Father in heaven, hallowed be your name

verses.text_gr: Πάντα οὖν ὅσα ἐὰν θέλητε ἵνα ποιῶσιν ὑμῖν οἱ ἄνθρωποι, οὕτως καὶ ὑμεῖς ποιεῖτε αὐτοῖς
verses.transliteration: Panta oun hosa ean thelēte hina poiōsin hymin hoi anthrōpoi, houtōs kai hymeis poieite autois
verses.translation_en: Therefore, whatever you wish that others would do to you, do also to them

verses.text_gr: Ἀγαπήσεις κύριον τὸν θεόν σου ἐν ὅλῃ τῇ καρδίᾳ σου καὶ ἐν ὅλῃ τῇ ψυχῇ σου καὶ ἐν ὅλῃ τῇ διανοίᾳ σου
verses.transliteration: Agapēseis kyrion ton theon sou en holē tē kardia sou kai en holē tē psychē sou kai en holē tē dianoia sou
verses.translation_en: You shall love the Lord your God with all your heart, with all your soul, and with all your mind

verses.text_gr: Ἀγαπήσεις τὸν πλησίον σου ὡς σεαυτόν
verses.transliteration: Agapēseis ton plēsion sou hōs seauton
verses.translation_en: You shall love your neighbor as yourself

verses.text_gr: Ἐν ἀρχῇ ἦν ὁ λόγος καὶ ὁ λόγος ἦν πρὸς τὸν θεόν καὶ θεὸς ἦν ὁ λόγος
verses.transliteration: En archē ēn ho logos kai ho logos ēn pros ton theon kai theos ēn ho logos
verses.translation_en: In the beginning was the Word, and the Word was with God, and the Word was God

verses.text_gr: Καὶ ὁ λόγος σὰρξ ἐγένετο καὶ ἐσκήνωσεν ἐν ἡμῖν
verses.transliteration: Kai ho logos sarx egeneto kai eskēnōsen en hēmin
verses.translation_en: And the Word became flesh and dwelt among us

verses.text_gr: Οὕτως γὰρ ἠγάπησεν ὁ θεὸς τὸν κόσμον ὥστε τὸν υἱὸν τὸν μονογενῆ ἔδωκεν
verses.transliteration: Houtōs gar ēgapēsen ho theos ton kosmon hōste ton huion ton monogenē edōken
verses.translation_en: For God so loved the world that he gave his only Son

verses.text_gr: Ἐγώ εἰμι τὸ φῶς τοῦ κόσμου ὁ ἀκολουθῶν ἐμοὶ οὐ μὴ περιπατήσῃ ἐν τῇ σκοτίᾳ
verses.transliteration: Egō eimi to phōs tou kosmou ho akolouthōn emoi ou mē peripatēsē en tē skotia
verses.translation_en: I am the light of the world. Whoever follows me will not walk in darkness

verses.text_gr: Ἐγώ εἰμι ἡ ὁδὸς καὶ ἡ ἀλήθεια καὶ ἡ ζωή οὐδεὶς ἔρχεται πρὸς τὸν πατέρα εἰ μὴ δι' ἐμοῦ
verses.transliteration: Egō eimi hē hodos kai hē alētheia kai hē zōē oudeis erchetai pros ton patera ei mē di' emou
verses.translation_en: I am the way, and the truth, and the life. No one comes to the Father except through me

verses.text_gr: Εἰρήνην ἀφίημι ὑμῖν εἰρήνην τὴν ἐμὴν δίδωμι ὑμῖν
verses.transliteration: Eirēnēn aphiēmi hymin eirēnēn tēn emēn didōmi hymin
verses.translation_en: Peace I leave with you; my peace I give to you
